主角萧凡本是一枚刚毕业的中文系大学生，灵魂穿越到异世界刚死的婴儿身上。
十三岁成为秀才，十六岁中举，十七岁成为贡士，随后他被太子选中，成为了太子侍读。
太子秦轩与镇国大将军孙女姜玉璃有婚约，大婚将至，太子秦轩找上了萧凡，让萧凡代替他洞房。
萧凡大惊，绿太子，不要命了？
太子无奈只能说出来自己是女人，她真正的名字叫秦萱，绝色无双。
知道了秘密不答应会死，萧凡只能答应。
关键时候系统终于觉醒，他拥有的是至尊签到系统，号称没有东西不能签到获得。
“系统，我能签到再获得一个系统吗？”
“系统，能签到得到一个宇宙吗？”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/04c2b7796ea689557559afc5d14d5b0f","author":"女帝666","author_id":"","book_id":"7233251754106686525","book_name":"娘子莫慌，其实我有亿点点修为！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#501010","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"10.6万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7233252042860003872","read_count":"105597","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1374645"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"652","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,扮猪吃虎,架空,东方玄幻","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/db8ee15c0cd43a632505b9ade6ff7fa2~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779304347&x-signature=9Ii1XMRz0b5VJjnoTbrXA4ATh0M%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"5368473931","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.9690934e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032203122763B444F5E6A52A42997B"}"},"relate_info_list":[ 1.系统全程爽，整个260+章节，都是蛮舒爽的，从屌丝逐渐成长，一路老六到牛逼plus[捂脸]
2.人物性格鲜明，人物不少，每一个描绘的挺鲜活，基本都是在主次程度下，人人都有特点[赞]
3.苟中有🗡️，主角在系统辅助下，苟出了🗡️矛，不错。
